title: Video: Stay Well This Season | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC
text:
? But don't worry—staying healthy this season doesn't have to be complicated. Watch this quick video to learn everyday actions you can take to prepare and protect yourself and those around you for a healthier season. https://bit.ly/4mZJFt5 
Message 2 
Respiratory illnesses are on the rise, and having a chronic condition can increase your risk of serious complications. If you, or someone you love, is at higher risk of complications from a respiratory illness, take everyday actions to reduce your risk of getting sick. Watch this quick video to learn how to prepare and protect yourself and those around you https://bit.ly/4mZJFt5
